original_datasets.name: Hurst Life History Strategy dataset (mmc1)
original_datasets.columns: [Age, DSM5_Total, MiniK_Total, HKSS_Total, DSM5_01-DSM5_23, MiniK_01-MiniK_20, HKSS_01-HKSS_22, SMID, Sex, ...]

summary_statistics.info: 138 rows x 231 columns; dtypes: 35 float64, 110 int64, 86 str.

original_datasets.notes: Dataset includes precomputed totals (DSM5_Total, MiniK_Total, HKSS_Total). Key variables present: Age, DSM5_Total, MiniK_Total, HKSS_Total. Item-level variables for DSM-5, Mini-K, and HKSS are available but summation is not required since totals exist.

tasks.task_instruction: Conduct the analysis without additional restriction.

analysis_path.path_description: Compute (or use) Mini-K and DSM-5 totals, control for age, estimate partial correlations and OLS regressions predicting DSM-5 from life history strategy (Mini-K and HKSS).
preprocessing_steps: Use MiniK_Total and DSM5_Total (and HKSS_Total if available); if only items are present, sum item scores to totals.
Retain observations with non-missing Age and totals.

key_choices.main_predictor_measure: MiniK_Total (sum of Mini-K items) and HKSS_Total (sum of HKSS items).
key_choices.missing_data_rule: Listwise deletion for variables in each model.
key_choices.data_processing: If needed, residualize variables by Age to compute partial correlations. Use totals directly when available.
key_choices.model_choice: Partial correlation controlling for Age; OLS regression DSM5_Total ~ MiniK_Total + Age and DSM5_Total ~ HKSS_Total + Age.

outcome.name: DSM5_Total
outcome.definition: Sum score of DSM-5 psychopathology items.

main_predictor.name: MiniK_Total and HKSS_Total
main_predictor.definition: Sum scores of Mini-K items and HKSS items, representing life history strategy.

analysis_code.notes: Script reads from /app/data/1-s2.0-S1090513816301118-mmc1.csv and writes JSON results to /app/data/task1_results.json. Implements partial correlations (controlling Age) and OLS with Age as control for MiniK_Total and HKSS_Total.

tasks.notes_for_agent: Follow this planned path; do not change the focal claim, dataset, or analysis goal.

tasks.task_instruction: Report the Mini-K measure instead of HKSS for life history strategy.

analysis_path.path_description: Compute (or use) Mini-K and DSM-5 totals, then compute the partial correlation between Mini-K and DSM-5 controlling for Age.
preprocessing_steps: Use MiniK_Total and DSM5_Total; if only items are present, sum item scores to totals.
Retain observations with non-missing Age and totals.

key_choices.missing_data_rule: Listwise deletion for variables in the correlation.
key_choices.data_processing: Residualize by Age to compute partial correlation.

outcome.name: DSM5_Total
outcome.definition: Sum score of DSM-5 psychopathology items.

main_predictor.name: MiniK_Total
main_predictor.definition: Sum score of Mini-K items representing life history strategy.

analysis_code.notes: Script reads from /app/data/1-s2.0-S1090513816301118-mmc1.csv and writes JSON results to /app/data/task2_results.json. Implements partial correlation between MiniK_Total and DSM5_Total controlling for Age.

tasks.notes_for_agent: Use Mini-K as the life history strategy measure; do not substitute other tests or models.

files.data/task1_analysis__py.py: Executes Task1: loads the CSV from /app/data, computes partial correlations controlling Age, runs OLS regressions with Age control, and outputs JSON results.
files.data/task2_analysis__py.py: Executes Task2: loads the CSV from /app/data, computes partial correlation between MiniK_Total and DSM5_Total controlling Age, and outputs JSON results.

codebase.notes: All IO is via /app/data. The repository also includes auxiliary Rmd and docx files that are not executed. Python scripts are self-contained and rely on pandas, numpy, scipy, and statsmodels.

analysis.instructions: Execute Task1 and Task2 using the original dataset. Produce structured JSON outputs with partial correlations (r, p, n) and OLS coefficients for Task1, and partial correlation for Task2.
not_allowed_actions: replace the planned path with a different analysis path

debugging_rule.repair_scope: fix dependency, file path, or output extraction issues only; do not redesign the analysis.

analysis.comparison_metrics: Partial correlation r and p-values (MiniK_Total–DSM5_Total controlling Age; HKSS_Total–DSM5_Total controlling Age for Task1). OLS coefficient, p-value, and standardized beta for MiniK_Total (and HKSS_Total) predicting DSM5_Total controlling Age.
